mspatPPM v1.1

"Multivariate Spatial Point Process Models for Image Data Analysis"

April 7, 2026

License: AGPL-3

Depends: msm, spatstat.geom, RColorBrewer, fields, PLNmodels, SuppDists, LearnBayes, R (>= 3.5.0)

Author: Kyu Ha Lee, Brent Coull, Suman Majumder, Jacqueline Starr

Maintainer: Kyu Ha Lee
